# rafay_cluster_kubernetes_versions (Data Source)

Use this data source to get the default, latest, and list of available Kubernetes versions.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "rafay_cluster_kubernetes_versions" "versions" {
  project                    = "defaultproject" 
  cluster_type               = "mks"
  cluster_name               = "test-cluster"
  include_deprecated_version = false
}

output "default_version" {
  value = data.rafay_cluster_kubernetes_versions.versions.default_version
}

output "latest_version" {
  value = data.rafay_cluster_kubernetes_versions.versions.latest_version
}

output "versions" {
  value = data.rafay_cluster_kubernetes_versions.versions.versions
}

# Use in an  cluster resource
resource "test_cluster" "example" {
  # ...
  # spec.config.kubernetes_version = data.rafay_cluster_kubernetes_versions.versions.latest_version
}
```

## Schema

### Required
- `project` (String) Project name from where the kubernetes version can be fetched.
- `cluster_type` (String) The type of the cluster. Currently only `"mks"` is supported. Example: `"mks"`.

### Optional
- `cluster_name` (String) Name of the cluster to fetch Kubernetes versions.
- `include_deprecated_version` (Boolean) If true, deprecated Kubernetes versions are included in the versions list. Defaults to false.

### Read-Only
- `default_version` (String) The default Kubernetes version for the cluster.
- `latest_version` (String) The latest supported Kubernetes version.
- `versions` (List of String) List of available Kubernetes versions.

**Note:** This data source currently supports only the `mks` cluster type. Support for other  cluster types will be available in a future release.
